function_reachability: Is there a call path from function 'main' to function 'printf'?

Is the loop with condition 'i < SIZE' always executed?

dominators: Is it guaranteed that whenever line 7:  <statement> for(i = 0;i < SIZE; i++) </statement> is reached, the statement line 13:  <statement> sum = -sum; </statement> has already been reached?

data_dependency: Does variable sum at line 6: <statement> 	int sum = 1; </statement> determine the value stored in variable sum at line 13: <statement> 				sum = -sum; </statement>?
Does the value of variable j at line 9: <statement> 		for(j = 0;j < SIZE;j++) </statement> depend on the value of variable k at line 5: <statement> 	int i,j,k; </statement>?
liveness: Is variable 'i' live at the end of function 'main'?

dead_code: Can the statement 'for(k = 0;k < SIZE;k++)' be considered dead code?
